creator: wolfgang@lyxys.ka.sub.org
text:
Created attachment 243739
relevant part of build log

Trying to build pecl-memcached 3.2.0 from 2023Q3 branch in poudriere.
ALL build options including SASL are set to UNSET. I have not tried to build with other option settings.
Build fails during "phase: configure" complaining about a missing "Package libcrypto". I have attached the relevant parts of the build log.
